caveats: Local and scratch source paths in source-like columns were normalized to stable labels.
Raw sample corpora and full simulation outputs are not committed, so this sidecar supports plot reproduction from summary data, not rerunning the publication-scale simulations.
code_version: Source checkout version was not recorded in the source summary table.

paper_source.note: No literal frontier_decoder2(2).tex file was present in the working environment; Frontier_decoder-2.pdf is the newest available rendered PDF candidate.

raw_corpus.notes: This repository commits compact plot-ready summary data only; raw per-shot corpora or full run outputs are not included.

source_artifact_note: Local/source artifact label normalized for provenance; not a public DOI or archive identifier.
source_command: Plot data copied from an existing compact summary artifact; committed renderer listed in the renderer field regenerates the paper plot output from this CSV.
